role_descriptions.BALANCED: Balanced local recommendation voice using Phi-4-mini when available.
role_descriptions.DEEP: Deeper local recommendation voice using Mistral when available.
role_descriptions.FAST: Quick local recommendation voice using Phi-4-mini when available.
role_descriptions.HANDOFF: No local model required; writes ChatGPT/Codex handoff packets.
role_descriptions.TNN: Tesseract Neural Network local Phi-4-mini hot lane with bounded NexusGate context, memory, and gates.

router_law: No replay evidence, no memory promotion.
No model output may directly execute tools or mutate files.

HANDOFF.reason: HANDOFF writes packets and requires no local model.

TNN.reason: TNN chats through local Phi-4-mini using NexusGate-local context, memory, and gates.
